books.title: Project Hail Mary
books.author: Andy Weir
books.description: Ryland Grace awakes from a long sleep alone and far from home, and the fate of humanity rests on his shoulders; the basis of the movie.

books.title: Dear Debbie
books.author: Freida McFadden
books.description: An advice columnist who is having trouble at work and home decides to get back at people she thinks deserve it.

books.title: Judge Stone
books.author: Viola Davis and James Patterson
books.description: Judge Mary Stone oversees an ethically complex case in her courtroom in Union Springs, Alabama.

books.title: Theo of Golden
books.author: Allen Levi
books.description: A man travels to a small Southern town, where he purchases pencil drawings of local residents and exchanges them for stories.

books.title: The Wings That Bind
books.author: Briar Boleyn
books.description: The third book in the Bloodwing Academy series. A second dragon awakens and a new headmaster arrives.

books.title: The Correspondent
books.author: Virginia Evans
books.description: Letters from someone she used to know push Sybil Van Antwerp toward revisiting her past and finding a way to forgive.

books.title: Mistakes Were Made
books.author: Lucy Score
books.description: The second book in the Story Lake series. A commitment-phobic literary agent stuck in a small town has a landlord who is hoping to settle down.

books.title: Want to Know a Secret?
books.author: Freida McFadden
books.description: An influencer known for her baking secrets tries to keep her offline secrets hidden.

books.title: Heated Rivalry
books.author: Rachel Reid
books.description: The second book in the Game Changers series. Rival captains of two hockey teams try to keep their relationship out of the spotlight; the basis of the TV series.

books.title: Dungeon Crawler Carl
books.author: Matt Dinniman
books.description: A Coast Guard vet named Carl and his ex-girlfriend's cat, Princess Donut, are trapped in a fantasy dungeon.

books.title: Fourth Wing
books.author: Rebecca Yarros
books.description: Violet Sorrengail is ordered into the dangerous dragon rider quadrant of Basgiath War College — where the riders she bonds with can make her unstoppable, or get her killed.

books.title: A Court of Thorns and Roses
books.author: Sarah J. Maas
books.description: A mortal huntress is taken to a magical land after killing a wolf in the woods — and discovers a world of faeries, ancient curses, and dangerous desire.

books.title: The Housemaid
books.author: Freida McFadden
books.description: A desperate woman takes a job as a housemaid for a wealthy family, only to discover that the picture-perfect household hides something very dark.

books.title: Is a River Alive?
books.author: Robert Macfarlane
books.description: Award-winning nature writer Macfarlane travels three great rivers asking what it would mean to grant rivers legal rights.

books.title: We Do Not Part
books.author: Han Kang
books.description: Nobel laureate Han Kang's haunting novel follows a writer drawn to Jeju Island, uncovering the buried trauma of a 1948 massacre.

books.title: Vanishing World
books.author: Sayaka Murata
books.description: From the author of Convenience Store Woman, a quietly unsettling novel about a young woman in a near-future Japan where human reproduction has been industrialised.

books.title: The Death of Us
books.author: Abigail Dean
books.description: When a teenager goes missing in a small English town, a journalist returns home and unravels a web of long-buried secrets that implicates everyone — including herself.
